info.title: ExeToMsi
info.description: Creates a .msi from a provided .exe installer.

options.name: --debug
options.description: Indicates the tool should write out debug logging. [default: False]

options.name: --exe-arguments
options.description: Arguments to call during the exe run.

options.name: --msi-name
options.description: Name of the msi file. Also the name of the installed app in windows.

options.name: --msi-version
options.description: Version of the .msi. Should be format 'A.B.C.D'.
